verdict_reason: Reverse-translating the engineering layer back to the verse's Sanskrit structure: (1) tasmāt → 'Therefore — and the conjunction is load-bearing' (verbatim conjunction recognition); (2) yasya nigṛhītāni sarvaśaḥ indriyāṇi → 'engineer whose attention surfaces have been architected, deliberately and on every side'; (3) tasya prajñā pratiṣṭhitā → 'has discriminative judgment that is established'. The compatibility is structural and verbatim. The Gaudiya Vaishnava reading (Prabhupada's 'restraint = positive engagement of the senses in service rather than mere suppression') is not invoked, but the engineering layer is consistent with it — the architecture-of-attention frame describes positive configuration (engagement of channels per their signal) rather than negative suppression. The Advaita reading (Shankara's nigṛhītāni sarvaśaḥ as withdrawal proper) is also consistent with the architecture-of-attention frame at the operational layer. The falsifiability clause closes the misread that this licenses ignoring real signals. No distortion. Pass on both 3.6 and 7.10.
